description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stereo sound system with a wood-textured exterior, featuring four circular speaker drivers arranged vertically on its front face. The wood grain pattern is visible on all sides, giving it a classic, natural appearance. The front panel houses the speakers, each with a metallic or gray rim, and the rest of the cabinet is unadorned. The sides and back are plain, with no visible controls, ports, or decorative elements. The object appears solid and robust, likely designed for floor-standing use in home or public urban environments. There are no visible brand markings, grilles, or control panels on the exterior.
description: A tall, wood-finished stereo sound system with four circular speakers on the front and a plain, unadorned exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing four vertically aligned circular speakers with metallic rims on a wood-textured panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden surface with the edges of the speakers slightly protruding.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain wood-textured surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden surface and slight speaker protrusions.
